# Basic log server test

# Set aggressive timeouts
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=3s
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=2s

# Create test log file
cat > test.log << EOF
2024-01-01 10:00:01 INFO Application started
2024-01-01 10:00:02 DEBUG Loading configuration
2024-01-01 10:00:03 INFO Configuration loaded successfully
2024-01-01 10:00:04 WARN Deprecated feature used
2024-01-01 10:00:05 ERROR Failed to connect to database
2024-01-01 10:00:06 INFO Retrying database connection
2024-01-01 10:00:07 INFO Database connection established
EOF

bash 'echo "Testing log server functionality..."'

# Test log reading
bash 'echo "Log server test complete"'

# Cleanup
exec rm -f test.log
